affected_pattern: International roaming customers exceed contractual roaming-uplift cap
root_cause: Regulatory cap not applied to inbound roamers — a new regulatory roaming cap was configured only for the outbound direction; inbound partner-served subscribers bypassed the cap and were charged full roaming rate.
supporting_evidence: SLA Breach RCA Playbook: Roaming-Regulatory-Cap Scope Defect pattern
Regulatory bulletin references both inbound and outbound scope
Tariff config shows cap applied only to direction=outbound
recommended_action: Extend the regulatory cap to both directions in the tariff table
Notify regulator proactively of the correction and refunds
Add a regulatory-compliance review gate to tariff changes
